title: Bug: API endpoint crashing on malformed JSON payload
body: The /predict API endpoint was returning a 500 error when receiving malformed JSON. Fixed by adding request validation middleware. Deployed to staging.

title: Documentation: AWS IAM role setup guide for S3 access
body: Step-by-step guide for configuring AWS IAM roles and S3 bucket policies for cross-account access. Covers trust relationships, inline policies, and role chaining.

title: Feature: GCP Vertex AI online prediction endpoint integration
body: Added support for GCP Vertex AI online prediction endpoints. Includes endpoint creation, model deployment, and real-time inference calls via the Vertex AI SDK.

title: Bug: Model serving ai service returning outdated predictions after deploy
body: After a deployment the ai service was serving predictions from the previous model version. Root cause was a missing cache invalidation step in the deployment pipeline. Fixed and documented.

title: Documentation: GCP Cloud Run deployment checklist and service account permissions
body: Comprehensive checklist for deploying services to GCP Cloud Run. Covers service account roles, permission scopes, environment variable injection, and artifact registry access.

title: Question: MLC pipeline support ticket routing — how does priority assignment work?
body: Answered: The mlc support pipeline uses a rule-based router that assigns priority based on keyword matching in the ticket title and body. P1 for production outages, P2 for feature requests, P3 for general questions.

title: Bug: AWS SageMaker endpoint timeout during model warm-up on cold start
body: SageMaker endpoint was timing out on cold start because the model artifact download exceeded the default timeout. Fixed by increasing the container startup timeout and pre-loading the model into memory on init.

title: Documentation: How to configure batch prediction jobs on cloud platforms
body: Guide covering batch prediction setup on both AWS SageMaker and GCP Vertex AI. Includes job configuration, input/output data formats, IAM permissions, and cost optimization tips.
